name: chain_looking_for_a_small_group_of_founders_to
method:
Looking for a small group of founders to grow with I’ve noticed something interesting with a few founders I know.

The ones growing the fastest usually aren’t building alone. They tend to have small g

stages.task: Scrape r/buildinpublic r/SaaS r/indiehackers r/Entrepreneur for posts containing 'founder group' OR 'mastermind' OR 'accountability group' OR 'cross-promote' OR 'launch support'. Also scrape Twitter for #buildinpublic founders with 500-10K followers and recent product launches.

Score each candidate on: audience overlap with our niches (faith/fitness/tech/solopreneur), product complementarity (not direct competitor), engagement rate >2%, active posting last 14 days, has shipped something live. Filter to top 20 per cycle.

Generate personalized outreach DM/comment offering specific cross-promo value: 'I run X apps in Y niche, happy to boost your next launch to our Z followers if you do the same'. Track sent, replied, converted.
Log active partnerships, schedule mutual boosts around launches, track referral clicks via UTM params, flag inactive partners for re-engagement or replacement.
